name_en: M81538 Purple Suitcase Patchwork Calfskin, LV is renowned for its exquisite craftsmanship, combining rare designs and special leathers with innovative technology and classic style. Vintage Purple Monogram Suitcase Patch, highlighting the world's presence. The wallet features a clever and unique interior design with various pockets and credit card slots. Dimensions: 19×10cm
